name: workbench-studio
description: Natural Language Schema Migration — OpenAI × Outskill Builder Hackathon 2026

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run sandbox" "npm run sandbox-client" "npm run agent" "npm run studio"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd sandbox && npm install && cd ../sandbox/client && npm install && cd ../../agent && npm install && cd ../studio && npm install && cd ../app/server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd ../..
scripts.build:all: cd studio && npm run build && cd ../sandbox/client && npm run build && cd ../../app/client && npm run build && cd ../..
